nodes.label: P2.1 synth — 9-cell grid (2/9 cells PASS the gate)
nodes.rationale: On synth, layer+lin (HERO) RISES +0.003/layer (0.71->0.75 mid-depth then settling ~0.71) and passes the gate; wall (len+sq) is flat (+0.000); every batch/group/online-norm cell declines. Confirms synth has headroom that CIFAR-flat lacks.
